title: vitis labrusca var. thunbergii
intro: Vitis labrusca var. thunbergii, also known as the Japanese wine grape or Japanese wild grape, is a species of grapevine native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Vitis labrusca var. thunbergii include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Vitis labrusca var. thunbergii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in the production of traditional medicines and wines in East Asia.
